---
title: "VI Simpósio Interdisciplinar de Ciência Ambiental"
title-block-banner: true
listing:
  id: listing-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
---

## Novidades

::: {#listing-posts}
:::

## Realização

:::::: grid
::: g-col-4
![](img/apoio/usp.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![](img/apoio/iee.jpeg){fig-align="center"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![](img/apoio/procam.jpeg){fig-align="center"}
:::
::::::
